data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for two-way SMS, allowing customers to reply to messages for confirmation, cancellation, or rescheduling. However, the evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm the implementation of this functionality. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not demonstrate that the system supports two-way SMS interactions, leading to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of two-way SMS functionality allowing customer replies.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
